description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit made of dark wood, featuring four open shelves and a single lower compartment with a handle, likely a drawer or cabinet door. The wood grain is visible across all surfaces, giving it a natural and slightly textured appearance. The front face is dominated by the open shelves, which are evenly spaced and suitable for storing books, decor, or small items. The lower section includes a horizontal handle, suggesting a pull-out drawer or door for concealed storage. The sides and back are solid panels with no visible openings or features. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, garages, or residential entryways for organized storage and display.
description: A tall, dark wood shelving unit with four open shelves and a lower compartment with a handle, featuring a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and a lower compartment with a handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid wood panel.
